purpose: Per-seed decomposition into engineering-discipline subsystems. A generated design is complete only when every required subsystem appears in part_tree with its evidence_features, and each subsystem is judged by its linked criteria.

disciplines.structures: Load-bearing geometry, frames, spars, skins, joints, stiffness
disciplines.mechanisms: Linkages, hinges, gears, cams, deployment, tilt/rotation devices
disciplines.actuation: Motors, servos, brakes, reducers and their mounting/replacement
disciplines.power: Battery, solar generation, charging, distribution, connectors
disciplines.electronics: Boards, drivers, wiring, signal routing, grounding
disciplines.comms: Antennas, radios, data links and their placement/clearance
disciplines.gnc: Attitude/position sensing and control hardware evidence (mock level)
disciplines.thermal: Heat paths, radiators, vents, thermal isolation notes
disciplines.payload: Mission equipment bay, sensor mounts, removable inserts
disciplines.human_factors: Wearability, ergonomics, don/doff, comfort, safety contact
disciplines.integration: Datums, interfaces, harness routing, service access, assembly order

required_subsystems.function: 3U frame, deployer rails, board stack support
Solar panel dummies, battery tray, charge/distribution board
Antenna deployer (tape-spring dummy ok), radio board slot, RF connector path
Attitude control evidence: reaction wheel/magnetorquer dummies, star tracker mount, sun sensor windows
On-board computer stack, harness between boards
Radiator face or thermal strap note from battery/OBC to structure
Removable payload module: optics bench, focal plane, thermal baffles, inspection window
Antenna/panel deployment hinges, separation spring plate, pod pusher contacts, release dummies (display-level)
Cold gas thruster bracket dummies and plumbing manifold mock (display-only, non-functional)
Inter-board harness routing, connectors, assembly datums, connection types and load-path closure
Wing planform, airfoil section evidence, winglets, elevon/control surface cutouts with hinges
Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
Motor pod / pusher prop mount dummy with bolt pattern and cooling path (non-operational)
Slide-in li-ion battery pack bay on CG rail, BMS and connector access
GPS, pitot boom, receiver/telemetry boards, antenna routing away from power leads
Non-weapon camera/gimbal sensor pod bay with removable insert and window
Servo pockets, control horns, pushrod/linkage channels
Wing/fuselage datums, harness raceways, hatch access, connection types and load-path closure
Tilt axis with bearing seats, servo linkage, rotation clearance arc
Motor pod with replaceable motor module and access cover
Wing spar carrying nacelle loads into fuselage spine; V-tail/ruddervator and landing gear attach structure
Slide-in li-ion battery pack bay with CG adjustment, BMS and connector access
Flight controller/autopilot tray, telemetry and VTX modules, motor power vs signal wire separation across tilt joint
IMU, pitot/airspeed sensor, GPS mount evidence near CG (mock level)
Nose payload/sensor bay with removable insert and service window
Nacelle interface datums, harness routing through tilt axis, hatches, connection types and load-path closure

small_launch_vehicle.boundary_note: All subsystems are educational display mockups; no propulsion, ignition, or flight-performance design.

required_subsystems.function: Propellant tank dummy barrels (LOX/fuel), interstage, payload fairing, fin set, skirts; stacking datums and alignment keys
Removable engine display cartridge: combustion chamber dummy, bell nozzle shell, turbopump dummy in cutaway bay (non-functional)
Avionics ring/tray with board mounts and harness pass-throughs
Battery module dummy with access panel
Parachute bay dummy with deployment door hinge (display-level)
Stage separation plane shown as datum + dummy clamp band (no energetic device)
Assembly order evidence, inspection windows, readiness checklist hooks, connection types and load-path closure
Rigid links with load path from tool flange to base, ribs where needed
J1-J6 joint cartridges: bearing seats, reducer dummies, wrist pitch/roll axes, shaft location
Replaceable motor modules per joint with fastener access
Encoder pockets and covers at each joint
Driver board bay, power/signal separation along the arm
External or inspectable harness spine with slack loops at every joint; connection types and load-path closure
Tool flange with standard bolt pattern and locating boss
Base plate with mounting holes, leveling, and cable entry
Per-finger four-bar/tendon linkage cartridges, single-pin removable
Plug-in flexion-resistance actuator modules at knuckle row
Flex/bend sensor channels per finger, IMU mount on hand plate
Controller board on back-of-hand with standoffs and connector orientation
Battery pocket at wrist with quick-swap access
Hand plate, wrist band, quick release, soft-contact zones, finger clearance
Knuckle-crossing wiring with service loops and flex-rated bend radius; connection types and load-path closure
